name: Xq28_recurrent_int22h_F8
description: Xq28 region containing the F8 (factor VIII) gene with int22h-1, int22h-2, int22h-3 SD blocks at >99.9% identity. NAHR between int22h-1 (inside intron 22 of F8) and int22h-2 or int22h-3 (telomeric) causes the F8 intron-22 inversion responsible for ~45% of severe haemophilia A. Also a recurrent ~0.5 Mb duplication CNV at Xq28 (MECP2/FLNA region) further telomeric.

architecture.internal_structure: Three int22h palindrome copies of ~9.5 kb at >99.9% identity, two telomeric to F8 in inverted orientation, one inside F8 intron 22; near-perfect identity mediates the inversion.
